repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest repo analogue is doc/API.md Section 1 panel residual-score geometry, not network-interference estimator comparison

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI gives ANI IPW with network HAC; HudgensHalloran2008 and BasseDingFellerToulis2024 cover partial-interference/randomization corners

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1: sharp ADE bounds from shared local-network completions under misspecified exposure maps is finite partial ID, not asymptotic estimator/variance equivalence

published_prior_art.cite: none; verified closest papers Leung2022ANI, Leung2023NCRI, and BasseDingFellerToulis2024 do not state a joint if-and-only-if frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none; panel_honest_did_phase_v1 is only an analogue about named estimator-map comparisons

published_prior_art.cite: none; BasseDingFellerToulis2024 has invalid permutation phenomena but not an open-set three-map ANI/NCR/RT separation theorem

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Leung2023NCRI is treated as supplying a direct-plus-spillover identifying functional K_NCR; the verified paper is about validity of cluster-robust variance inference via low-conductance/spectral clustering, not a point-estimator map for the exposure contrast.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup
soundness_flags.one_line: The target uses Y_{i,n}(z:e_{1,i}) and Y_{i,n}(z:e_{0,i}) without defining how a full assignment vector is selected or averaged conditional on an exposure label under interference.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: K_NCR and hat_tau_NCR are introduced as score-kernel and linear-functional objects, but network cluster-robust inference is a variance/inference procedure; the proposal must define the underlying point estimator before comparing identifying functionals.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The condition ||W^{1/2}R_M||_op <= smallest nonzero singular value of K cannot by itself imply the omitted-tail score lies in ker K; a null-distance, alignment, or cone-restricted residual term is missing.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The assumptions give cluster refinement and orbit label preservation, while the proof sketch requires equality of the exposure, cluster, and orbit projections; refinement/preservation alone need not give identical first-order variances.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the scalar norm-vs-singular-value frontier with a distance-to-common-null or cone-restricted singular-value criterion, and state the exact residual term that vanishes at equivalence.
Define the NCR object as either a covariance operator attached to a named point estimator or replace it with a published estimator whose mean functional is actually being compared.
Strengthen the oracle theorem assumptions from refinement/preservation to equality of the relevant sigma-fields/projections, or add the missing within-cell residual condition.
Make tau_ds(r) a fully specified finite-population exposure estimand by defining the exposure-label intervention or the assignment/orbit averaging convention.

recommended_next_step: Revise the statement layer before Stage 0: define the estimator/variance objects precisely and restate the frontier using null-distance or cone-restricted compatibility, then rerun novelty review.
